_comment: Hand-curated trusted publishers of agent skills. Add a new entry only when you've vetted that the repo's SKILL.md files follow the standard frontmatter format. The refresh script reads from these to populate the available-skills section of catalog.json.

repos.name: skills
repos.description: Anthropic's official skill collection — highest authority for the agentic-skill format.
